== Nice to have

1. split common module into separate sub modules
2. tests sharing
3. cache extension
    - Extract an interface.
    - By default, a local cache.
    - Do an optional redis implementation.
4. projection: use Gizmo to generate projections list aggregate this way:

https://www.usatiuk.com/2025/01/23/code-generation-and-modification-using-quarkus-extensions/#modifying-bytecode-using-gizmo

```java
public interface Projection {

    /**
     * This method will be autogenerated.
     * @return list of aggregate ids composed in this projection.
     */
    default Set<AggregateId> aggregateIds() {
        return Set.of();
    }
}
```
